channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Alan De Maid For sale sign., 20th March
item.description:
This has been in this area for a few weeks now. Name and telephone number is on the sign. Please ask them to pick it up or fine them.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite number 10 minster road, 20th March
item.description:
The stones that keep the pavement in place have been knocked off by cars parking to drop the kids to the school next to it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Minster Road, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over full bins litters everywhere, 20th March
item.description:
Over full bins litters everywhere

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodberry Down, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: What is going on?, 20th March
item.description:
Litters everywhere

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodberry Down, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over full bins litters everywhere, 20th March
item.description:
Over full bins litters everywhere

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodberry Down, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light out, 20th March
item.description:
One of the 4 lights in the underpass has blown. See photo. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 308, Westwood Lane, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain still blocked, 20th March
item.description:
Been reporting this drain for years. Never been attended as is full solid. There is a constant issue with the 4 path drains nearby. Maybe pipe work is blocked?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, High Street, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two cars blocking the road, 20th March
item.description:
Two cars are parked on opposite sides of the road (a grey Toyota and an old red banger). But they are parked so tightly opposite each other, delievery vans can’t get down to the end of Parish Gate and Copsewood close. It also means ambulances / Fire Engines will not be able to get through - so it’s not just inconsiderate, but dangerous. It’s been this way for 3 weeks now. Both are also parked over dropped kerbs that do not belong to them.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 130A, Parish Gate Drive, Falconwood, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damage to play park equipment, 20th March
item.description:
Three items are damaged - the green and blue spinning things (see both attached photos) and the blue large swing is chained to the side for some reason (no photo of this). There’s also offensive graffiti on some items (photo attached). Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Green, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole at entrance to car park, 20th March
item.description:
Pothole at entrance to car park
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Longleigh Lane, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lights not turning on, 20th March
item.description:
The lights doesn't turn on, please check the connection for the light.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paradise Place, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle on ramsden road, 20th March
item.description:
Vehicle has been present for a number of months, contact with neighbours has yielded no answer to ownership and we believe it to be abandoned

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heath Way, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner Dunton/Lynton Rd, 20th March
item.description:
Bin needs emptying please. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lynton Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lynton/Welsford Rd, 20th March
item.description:
Please empty this bin Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lynton Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 trolleys & a suitcase of clothes, 20th March
item.description:
These items have been here for over 2 weeks. Please can you arrange clearance. Thank you for continued work to keep our local area tidy.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, High Street, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Peascroft house entrance Willesden Lane, 20th March
item.description:
Dumped waste in front area of Peascroft house

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Park, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: 3 times lucky?, 20th March
item.description:
See cases 9060143 9060114 9112953 All closed. The contractors have come and put the tiniest bit of tarmac down outside No 7. In the meantime the reamindr left ans outside 33 to 37. Cars are swerving across to avoid these craters. This really needs proper attention, please just to the job properly and fill all the potholes. or tarmac the whole sections.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Harland Avenue, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Top of ledrington road litter, 20th March
item.description:
Top of ledrington road covered in huge amount of litter and the rest of the road also needs a good clean up on both sides

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ledrington Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Entire length of shooters hill, 20th March
item.description:
Refective signs and KEEP LEFT arrows on all central pedestrian traffic islands in between carriageway need urgent clean. No reflectivity from the signs as covered in years of dirt and grim. Involves a urgent clean about 5 or 6 central islands
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Why do people think that we want their rubbish whilst blocking half the pavement, 20th March
item.description:
Why do people think middle class fly tipping is ok . Why do they think it’s ok to abandon their stuff in the middle of the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Greenfield Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
